harness.boundary: external C ABI consumer of generated header and object only
harness.reduction_contract: signed i32 max reduction combines input lanes with the scalar accumulator seed
harness.scalar_result_contract: only out[0] is written and non-scalar output slots preserve sentinels
harness.source_pattern_contract: two signed input patterns and two scalar seeds prove source contribution, seed contribution, source preservation, and multi-VL runtime n behavior
